title: 50 Non Slip Velvet Hangers | Heavy Duty Grey Felt Coat Hangers |360 Degree Swivel Hooks |Premium Space Saving Design
features: ELEGANT AND VERSATILE: the slim design of our coat hangers coupled with its velvet finish gives a luxurious and minimalistic aesthetic, complements home décor while being practical!
BIG VALUE PACK: containing 50 velvet suit hangers that can be used to accommodate a growing wardrobe or for the whole family, a cost effective choice for the household.
DURABLE: the non-slip velvet fabric on our coat hangers coats a strong and sturdy plastic base, store a variety of heavier coats and jackets with confidence
FIT MORE: the sleek design of the slim livel velvet suit hangers allow you to maximise storage, perfect for utilising smaller spaces.
PRACTICAL: our sturdy coat hangers have a gorgeous non-slip velvet finish designed for ease in storing clothes, no more piles of clothes falling off hangers sitting at the bottom of your wardrobe!
description: Velvet Suit Coat Jacket Hangers Heavy Duty Closet Storage Organizer Coat Hooks
